metadata.filed_by: Arjun Deshmukh (via neighbor Mrs. Meena Kulkarni)

content:
FIRST INFORMATION REPORT

Under Section 154 CrPC, Police Station: Shivaji Nagar, Pune
FIR No.: FIR/2024/0087
Date of Registration: 12/03/2024
Time: 19:15 hrs

Complainant: Arjun Deshmukh, aged 42, resident of Shivaji Nagar, Pune, vegetable vendor. Complainant was physically assaulted and is currently admitted at Ruby Hall Clinic.

Factual Narrative:
On 12/03/2024 at approximately 18:35 hrs, the complainant was closing his vegetable stall outside Shree Ram Grocery Store, Shivaji Nagar, Pune. While turning to lock the gate, he was suddenly struck from behind on the left forearm and head with a heavy wooden plank by an unidentified male wearing a dark hoodie and blue jeans. The assailant fled towards the alley behind the store. The complainant fell unconscious and was found by Mrs. Meena Kulkarni, a neighbor, who alerted shop assistant Rajesh Patil. Both rushed the complainant to Ruby Hall Clinic, where he was diagnosed with a fractured left radius and multiple contusions.

CCTV footage from the grocery store entrance captured the incident. Three witnesses — Mrs. Meena Kulkarni, Rajesh Patil, and Vikram Joshi — identified the suspect as Rohan Deshmukh, estranged cousin of the complainant, due to a longstanding property dispute. A blood-stained wooden plank was recovered from behind the store, bearing fingerprints and blood matching the complainant. The suspect’s clothing and build match Rohan Deshmukh’s known appearance. The complainant has no known enemies other than Rohan Deshmukh. The case is being registered under IPC 323, 324, and 326.

Investigating Officer: SI Ramesh Desai
Signature: __________________

Date: 12/03/2024
